title: Automate a status change based on the date
excerpt: can we with the automation update a status according to the due date. Let me explain. I have a due date of April 15, I would like more than 7 days before my deadlines column to be green with mention “TO DO”, between 7 da…

posts.author: Julienhosni (julien Hosni)
posts.cookedHtml: can we with the automation update a status according to the due date. Let me explain. I have a due date of April 15, I would like more than 7 days before my deadlines column to be green with mention “TO DO”, between 7 days and D0 in orange with mention “ATTENTION” and if the date is passed in red with mention “LATE”

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julienhosni

Yes, you can use this template:

image811×587 13.1 KB

Or, go directly to the custom automations and set up something like this:

image1048×689 25.6 KB

Note that in both situations the “When” parameter can be set to consider days before or after the given date:

image1141×528 38.4 KB

posts.author: Jessie_Plumpton (Jessie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, This is great and I have set up something similar. If however if our plan is updated ie the due date was in the past (so set to ‘late’ status) but is then updated to be in the future (so now ok/not late) how can you get the status to change back to ‘ok’?
